'''sahuju''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:arachnidism|arachnidism]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-h-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:arachnidism|arachnidism]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| sahuju
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || sæhijith || sæhijij || sæhijish || sæhiji
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || sahuhujuth || sahuhujuj || sahuhujush || sahuhuju
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || sahujuth || sahujuj || sahujush || sahuju
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || sahufjufth || sahufjufj || sahufjufsh || sahufjuf
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || sahujuthu || sahujuju || sahujushu || sahujuku
|-
| [[Patient]] || sahujuth || sahujuj || sahujush || sahuju
|-
| [[Possessive]] || sahujuthul || sahujujul || sahujushul || sahujukul
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || sahujuuthuthu || sahujuujuju || sahujuushushu || sahujuuku
|-
| [[Dative]] || sahujuthun || sahujujun || sahujushun || sahujukun
|-
| [[Speaker]] || sahujuthuoro || sahujujuoro || sahujushuoro || sahujukuoro
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words 5bad82d]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|5a3fb4a}}
